productDisplayName: Fabindia Men Printed Grey Tussar Shirt
description: Composition Printed grey shirt made of Tussar silk/ cotton, has a spread collar, a buttoned placket, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean only fabindia specialises in natural, craft-based contemporary pieces, while also providing rural craft persons a platform to use traditional dyeing and fabric printing techniques. Capturing the essence of Indian roots, crafted with a focus on the traditional, this shirt sets the tone for an all-new ethnic trend for men. Wear this with denims or cotton pants. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18& rdquo
